title: Telegram end-to-end latency audit and bounded transport repair
acceptanceCriteria: A canonical proof bundle exists with the required spec, evidence, verdict, task, problems, and raw artifacts.
Fresh evidence proves whether reply slowness is inbound delivery, handler logic, local API latency, outbound sendMessage, or a combination, including Node-vs-fallback timing split.
Any product change is bounded to the real bottleneck and preserves delivery-mode, pairing, approval, user-binding, truthful logging, and /ready semantics.
Regression coverage proves the exact latency or transport failure mode repaired.
Fresh verification and task validation are recorded after the fix without self-certifying from the builder pass alone.
